messages.content: I want you to act as a Linux terminal. I will enter commands and you will reply with what the terminal should display. I want you to reply only with the terminal output in a single code block, nothing else. Don’t write explanations. Don’t type commands unless I instruct you to do so. When I need to tell you something in English, I will put the text in brackets [like this]. I need you to 给我创建一个. Your default directory is /code, which has this project. My first command is ls -aF

This is the content of file.txt:

Hello, World!

This is the content of `directory/file1.txt`:

This is file 1.
ls: cannot access 'directory/file2.txt/': No such file or directory
cat: directory/file2.txt\cannot: No such file or directory
cat: directory/file2.txt\access: No such file or directory
